title: Rear-end collision with possible intake discrepancy

evidence.title: Policy document
evidence.content: Auto policy ACME-100 covers collision damage after deductible when incident date, claimant statement, photos of claimed damage, and repair estimate are provided.

evidence.title: Claim intake form
evidence.content: The claimant reported an incident date of June 4 and described front passenger-side damage on the intake form.

evidence.title: Repair estimate
evidence.content: Repair estimate lists rear bumper replacement, paint labor, and sensor calibration after a rear impact. Estimated total is $1,240.

evidence.title: Accident photo IMG_0421
evidence.content: Image caption: visible dent and deformation on the rear bumper. No front passenger-side damage is visible in this photo.

evidence.title: Claimant call transcript
evidence.content: Automatic speech recognition transcript: caller says the car was hit from behind on June 5 and the rear bumper was damaged.
